title: Services people moving from Spain often use in the Netherlands
intro: Housing, banking, and insurance are usually the first categories to line up after registration planning.

items.reason: Short and mid-term listings while you secure a long-term rental.
Digital Dutch banking after you have address and BSN.
Euro transfers and first-month cash flow across the border.
Compare Dutch basic health insurance once you are resident.

disclosure: Some links are affiliate links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.
